'''kopagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jackassed|jackassed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-p-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jackassed|jackassed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kopagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || kopagithi || kopagiji || kopagishi || kopagiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || kopaguthu || kopaguju || kopagushu || kopaguku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || kopaguthu || kopaguju || kopagushu || kopaguku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || kopagufthuf || kopagufjuf || kopagufshuf || kopagufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || kopagethe || kopageje || kopageshe || kopageke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || kopagotho || kopagojo || kopagosho || kopagoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || kopagotho || kopagojo || kopagosho || kopagoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || kopagofthof || kopagofjof || kopagofshof || kopagofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || kopagïfthïf || kopagïfjïf || kopagïfshïf || kopagïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || kopagïfthïf || kopagïfjïf || kopagïfshïf || kopagïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || kopagïfthïf || kopagïfjïf || kopagïfshïf || kopagïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || kopagïfthïf || kopagïfjïf || kopagïfshïf || kopagïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || kopagæthæ || kopagæjæ || kopagæshæ || kopagækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || kopagatha || kopagaja || kopagasha || kopagaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || kopagatha || kopagaja || kopagasha || kopagaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || kopagafthaf || kopagafjaf || kopagafshaf || kopagafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || kopagasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || kopagshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || kopagroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || kopagmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || kopagyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gokopagnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gokopagnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gokopagnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gokopagnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || kopapagasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || kopapagshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || kopapagroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || kopapagmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || kopapagyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gokopapagnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gokopapagnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gokopapagnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gokopapagnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || kepægasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || kepægshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || kepægroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || kepægmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || kepægyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gokepægnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gokepægnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gokepægnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gokepægnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || kopfagasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || kopfagshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || kopfagroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || kopfagmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || kopfagyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gokopfagnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gokopfagnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gokopfagnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gokopfagnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
